zh.Warmingham, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾瓦明加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian de Buron於大約1190年出生在英國時，她的父親Roger de Buron34歲，母親Nichola de Verdun26歲。她於1205年之前與Roger de Mainwaring結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Warmingham, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾瓦明加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian de Buron于大约1190年出生在英国时，她的父亲Roger de Buron34岁，母亲Nichola de Verdun26岁。她于1205年之前与Roger de Mainwaring结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Buron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Raoul, Benedicte, Gaston, Pierre.  Spanish Enrique, Felipe, Oliverio.

French: status name or topographic name from Old French buron ‘hut, cottage’, a derivative of ancient Germanic būr ‘hut’, or a habitational name from (Le) Buron, the name of several places mainly in the northern part of France.
Spanish (Burón): habitational name from Burón in León.

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian de Buron was born about 1190, in England, her father, Roger de Buron, was 34 and her mother, Nichola de Verdun, was 26. She married Roger de Mainwaring before 1205. They were the parents of at least 7 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian de Buron est née environ 1190, à Angleterre, son père, Roger de Buron, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Nichola de Verdun, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Mainwaring avant 1205. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christian de Buron um 1190 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Buron 34 und ihre Mutter Nichola de Verdun 26. Sie hat vor 1205 Roger de Mainwaring geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian de Buron è nata il circa 1190 nel England, sua padre, Roger de Buron, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Nichola de Verdun, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Roger de Mainwaring prima del 1205. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli.

ja.Derbyshire, England: イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイア
ja.rosethorne, chesshire, england: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイア
ja.Warmingham, Cheshire, England: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワーミンガム
ja.lifeSummary: Christian de Buronが約1190年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Roger de Buronは34歳，母Nichola de Verdunは26歳であった。1205年以前にRoger de Mainwaringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian de Buron(이)가 대략 1190년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Buron(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nichola de Verdun(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1205년 이전 Roger de Mainwaring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다.

mn.Warmingham, Cheshire, England: Warmingham, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian de Buron nasceu aproximadamente 1190, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Buron, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Nichola de Verdun, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger de Mainwaring antes 1205. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian de Buron родилась около 1190 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Roger de Buron было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Nichola de Verdun, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Mainwaring перед 1205 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christian de Buron nació aproximadamente 1190, en Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Buron, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Nichola de Verdun, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Roger de Mainwaring antes de 1205. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos.
